findings.note: '528' is a snip count and 'Finding Our Way' is a podcast show name from an aggregate-by-show verification result, not a street address.
findings.evidence_context: Inside the patch record's validated_outcome field: '...Retrieval verified at scale against the real corpus: aggregate by-show (528 Finding Our Way / 336 Lenny's / ...), favorites count 11...' — a press-emitted provenance note quoting per-show snip counts.
